code.text: Coagulation

text.div:
Coagulation

Test15-MAR-2021Reference RangeUnit
Fibrin D-dimer FEU [Mass/volume] in Platelet poor plasma0.6 H0 - 0.5ug/mL
Prothrombin time (PT)12.811.0 - 13.0s
INR in Platelet poor plasma by Coagulation assay1.7 H0.9 - 1.2{INR}

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows hypoxemia, mild anemia, leukopenia with lymphopenia, thrombocytopenia, and elevated D-dimer, ferritin, INR, creatinine, bilirubin, ALT, and chloride. These findings suggest impaired oxygenation, possible acute or chronic liver and kidney dysfunction, and a pro-inflammatory/pro-thrombotic state. Close clinical correlation is recommended to rule out infection, organ failure, or hematologic disorders.
